$schema_comment: Cursor hooks. Canonical guardrail logic lives in .claude/hooks/ and brain/hooks/; bin/run-claude-hook.sh only adapts payload and verdict shapes - never fork hook logic into a Cursor-only copy. Trust the workspace so project hooks load; check the Hooks output channel if nothing fires. WINDOWS: replace `bash` with Git Bash's full path (e.g. "C:/Program Files/Git/bin/bash.exe"). Note: Cursor cannot inject prompt context from beforeSubmitPrompt yet, so brain enrichment is best-effort there - agents should query the brain MCP or search it directly on substantive prompts.
